name: Structural Evolution
description: Generates mutation recommendations for one chain of interest given a protein structure. To produce mutations for antibody variable domains, run the workflow individually for the heavy and light chains. Achieved up to 25-fold improvement in neutralization and 37-fold improvement in affinity against antibody-escaped viral variants of concern BQ.1.1 and XBB.1.5, respectively.
capabilities: Generates mutation recommendations for one chain of interest given a protein structure
To produce mutations for antibody variable domains, run the workflow individually for the heavy and light chains
Achieved up to 25-fold improvement in neutralization and 37-fold improvement in affinity against antibody-escaped viral variants of concern BQ.1.1 and XBB.1.5, respectively

designedChain.description: Chain ID of the chain of interest for mutation recommendations

numMutations.description: Number of mutation recommendations to generate
